summary: Beat Mates iteration 5 testing complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Daily.co video call integration verified: room creation, token generation, and session accept with room_url all working. Regression tests passed for auth, posts, stories. Frontend: Login works, home feed displays correctly with stories bar and posts.

issues: Console warnings: expo-av deprecation (use expo-video), shadow* style deprecation (use boxShadow), pointerEvents deprecation, useNativeDriver not supported - all cosmetic warnings from previous iterations

critical_code_review_comments: DAILY.CO INTEGRATION VERIFIED: POST /api/video-call/create-room creates rooms successfully (HTTP 200)
DAILY.CO INTEGRATION VERIFIED: POST /api/video-call/token generates meeting tokens correctly
DAILY.CO INTEGRATION VERIFIED: POST /api/video-call/end/{room_name} ends calls and marks sessions completed
LESSON FLOW VERIFIED: Teacher accept (POST /api/live-sessions/{id}/accept) creates Daily.co room and returns room_url in response
GET /api/live-sessions/{session_id} correctly returns room_url and room_name fields
BUG FIX VERIFIED: reels.tsx hooks (React.useState, React.useEffect) correctly placed at component top before conditional returns (lines 23-48)
BUG FIX VERIFIED: calendar.tsx time picker has interactive TouchableOpacity chevron-up/chevron-down arrows for From/To times (lines 190-260)
REGRESSION PASSED: POST /api/auth/login works with mario@test.com and teacher@test.com
REGRESSION PASSED: GET /api/posts returns posts correctly
REGRESSION PASSED: GET /api/stories returns grouped stories correctly
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created live sessions for testing video call flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily.co integration is fully working - rooms are created, tokens generated, and sessions properly updated with room_url. The video-call/[id].tsx page uses WebView (or iframe on web) to load Daily.co rooms. Previous fixes (hooks in reels.tsx, calendar time picker arrows) remain in place and verified. Teacher user might need availability toggled ON before student can request lesson - tests handle this automatically.

new_daily_co_video_call_integration.POST /api/video-call/token: PASSED - Generates meeting token for room
new_daily_co_video_call_integration.POST /api/video-call/end/{room_name}: PASSED - Ends call and updates session status to completed

lesson_flow_with_video_call.get_session_with_room_info: PASSED - GET /api/live-sessions/{id} returns room_url and room_name

frontend_verification.home_feed: PASSED - Stories bar (Your Story + users), posts feed, tab bar with 6 icons visible
